title: Sinon-Chai Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Sinon-Chai assertions in tests.

commands.description: Assert that a spy was called at least once
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was called at least once

commands.description: Assert that a spy was called once
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was called once

commands.description: Assert that a spy was called with specific arguments
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was called with specific arguments

commands.description: Assert that a spy was called exactly twice
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was called exactly twice

commands.description: Assert that a spy was called before another spy
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was called before another spy

commands.description: Assert that a spy was always called with specific arguments
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy was always called with specific arguments

commands.description: Assert that a stub was called with new
commands.scenario: Assert that a stub was called with new

commands.description: Assert that a mock expectation was met
commands.scenario: Assert that a mock expectation was met

commands.description: Assert that a stub was called exactly three times
commands.scenario: Assert that a stub was called exactly three times

commands.description: Assert that a spy threw an error
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy threw an error

commands.description: Assert that a spy threw a specific error
commands.scenario: Assert that a spy threw a specific error

commands.description: Assert that a spy did not throw an error
